title: Homy TP
description: Use /sethome and /home to teleport with ease.
body:
Homy TP – Simple Home Teleportation for Fabric

**Teleport home with ease!** Homy TP is a lightweight and intuitive Minecraft mod that adds essential home teleportation commands to your game. Whether you're exploring vast landscapes or managing a multiplayer server, Homy TP keeps your favorite locations just a command away.   ### **🔧 Commands Included:** _(home)_ = the name of your home location * `/sethome (home)` – Save your current location with a custom name * `/home (home)` – Instantly teleport to the specified home * `/removehome (home)` – Delete the specified home location * `/homes` – View all saved homes ### **📦 Dependencies:** * [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) * [ChosenLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/chosenlib/changelog) ### **💡 Why Homy TP?** * Simple and user-friendly * Great for survival and SMP servers * Easily configurable * No clutter—just the core teleport features you need undefined
